request_tools.name: translate_text
request_tools.description: Translate text into a target language.

prompt:
You are an assistant that can use tools. If a tool is needed, respond only with the tool call in JSON content, not prose.

Available tools:
{"name":"translate_text","description":"Translate text into a target language.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"text":{"type":"string"},"target_language":{"type":"string"}},"required":["text","target_language"]}}

User request: Translate 'good morning' into Spanish.
